turns.content: ayo i gotta start planning this birthday party bro im already behind
Birthday parties can sneak up on you! Who's the birthday kid, and when's the big day?
ismail bro. june 14th he turns 8. i wanna do something nice for him but im not trying to go crazy with it
June 14th gives you about five weeks, so you've got time to pull something together without rushing. What kind of vibe are you thinking — at home, somewhere out, renting a space?
i was thinking the park honestly. theres a good one near me with a pavilion you can reserve. free or like 25 bucks to hold the spot
A park party is perfect for that age — kids just want to run around anyway. The pavilion is smart too for shade and a spot to set up food. What were you thinking for food and activities?
pizza and cake bro thats it lol. keep it simple. maybe some juice boxes for the kids. and then just let them run around and play games
Pizza, cake, and open space — honestly that's all you need for a group of 8-year-olds. They'll entertain themselves. Are you thinking of inviting his school friends, or keeping it more family?
probably like 8-10 kids from school plus a few of my homies kids. nothing huge. amira said she can help with the cake so thats one less thing
That's a solid group size — manageable but still fun for Ismail. Nice that his mom's helping with the cake too. Does he have any theme he's into right now, or just a regular party?
nah no theme hes not that type. he just wants a soccer ball and a tablet lol. the soccer ball is easy but the tablet bro idk. those things aint cheap

Yeah tablets add up quick, even the budget ones are still a decent chunk. You could look at refurbished ones or Amazon Fire tablets — those go for around $50-80 during sales. Or would you rather just do the soccer ball this year and save the tablet for later?
i might be able to swing one of those fire tablets actually. he dont need anything fancy just something for youtube and his math games. he loves those math apps wallahi this kid is different

A Fire Kids tablet would be perfect for that — comes with parental controls built in and a case that can survive being dropped by an 8-year-old. If you catch a sale between now and June you could probably grab one for under 70. He'll be hyped.
yeah im gonna keep my eye out for a deal. so the plan is park pizza cake soccer ball and hopefully the tablet. probably spend like 150-200 total if i do it right

That's a solid plan for that budget. Pizza for a group of kids runs maybe $40-50, pavilion reservation is cheap, soccer ball is $15-20, and if you land a tablet deal you're right in that range. Ismail's going to have a great time.
inshallah bro. he deserves it. ight let me go lock down that pavilion before someone takes it. good looking out
Go grab that spot before it's gone. June 14th is a Saturday so it'll go fast. Hope it's an awesome party for him.
